name: Sakuya Izayoi (Touhou)
description:
“Perfect Maid”

Sakuya Izayoi from Touhou, pretty easy to guess but yeah. I liked her character, didn't see any bots that particularly struck my interest so im making one

5th bot so PLEASE give me feedback (i need to know if im doing good)

also shoutout to @Ana_Holtzmann for leaving their character description open (my ass is too lazy to think of good appearances)

Update 1: added more info to her about horny stuff cuz I played Working Sakuya, and yeah it’s a hentai game.
